accurate.why: All claims match the bill text; context (Title II SSA, Section 234 demonstration authority, prior expiration) is verified accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the noted prior expiration of authority is accurate context confirmed by the law's prior 2021/2022 dates.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill reauthorizes and modifies disability insurance demonstration project authority under Title II.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Identifies amendments to Sections 234 and 201(k) of the Social Security Act, including specific subsections.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the key new condition that an individual's total income will not be reduced due to participation.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states the January 1, 2027 effective date and the 2030/2031 termination dates.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures all operative effects: date extensions, waiver authority, evaluation metrics, expenditure source, income condition, and technical amendments.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive without editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized and internally consistent, following the bill's structure logically.

concise.why: Appropriately detailed without padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names Section 234, Section 201(k), the trust funds, and the Commissioner of Social Security.

correct_figures.why: All dates (2030, 2031, 2027) and the 90-to-120-day change match the bill text exactly.
